redis.clients.jedis.search

Interface RediSearchPipelineCommands

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    RedisModulePipelineCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ClusterPipeline, MultiNodePipelineBase, Pipeline, ReliableTransaction, ShardedPipeline, Transaction, TransactionBase

    public interface RediSearchPipelineCommands
